name: FREEZE ME SLIM Cryolipolysis
shortDescription: New-generation cryolipolysis (fat freezing) device with 4 applicators, integrated body composition analysis and smart client tracking. Long-lasting body contouring without surgery.
description: FREEZE ME SLIM is a new-generation cryolipolysis device that uses the most advanced fat-reduction technology to help target stubborn fat deposits – without surgery, pain or downtime. It works through controlled cooling of the fat cells: the cells crystallise, then the body breaks them down and eliminates them naturally.
metaTitle: FREEZE ME SLIM Cryolipolysis | 4 applicators, body analysis, contouring
metaDescription: FREEZE ME SLIM – New-generation cryolipolysis with 4 applicators, -10°C cooling, vacuum system and integrated body analysis. Non-surgical body contouring.

videoDescription.headline: FREEZE ME SLIM – A client favourite and your salon's profit engine
paragraphs: FREEZE ME SLIM is more than just a machine – it is a stable, predictable revenue source that can quickly become one of your salon's most sought-after treatments. Visible, measurable results without surgery, pain or recovery time.

Course-based packages of 3-6 sessions, body-analysis-supported client tracking and premium-tier positioning can drive significant revenue growth. No more guessing what the machine actually does – the numbers speak for themselves.

afterVideo.text: Have a question about FREEZE ME SLIM? We are happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Would you like to see FREEZE ME SLIM in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out yourself!

final.headline: Interested in FREEZE ME SLIM Cryolipolysis?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we will help you decide how it fits your salon's profit strategy.

featureRows.headline: Why choose FREEZE ME SLIM?
featureRows.subtitle: 4 applicators, -10°C controlled cooling, intelligent vacuum and integrated body analysis – professional contouring for every body area.

features.title: 4 applicators – multiple areas at the same time
features.description:
FREEZE ME SLIM is equipped with 4 applicators of different sizes that can be used simultaneously. This makes parallel treatment of several body areas possible, drastically reducing treatment time and increasing daily client throughput.

Applicator sizes and areas:

Large applicator: abdomen, thighs
Medium applicator: abdomen, thighs, buttocks
Small applicator: arms, smaller areas
Simultaneous use possible

features.title: -10°C controlled cooling + vacuum system
features.description: For targeted fat reduction the device cools down to -10°C while the intelligent vacuum system regulates negative pressure between 10-83 kPa. The heating + cooling combination ensures a comfortable treatment: the treated areas reach the temperature required to crystallise the fat cells while the client's comfort is maintained throughout.
features.highlight: Controlled cooling and precise vacuum for long-lasting results.

features.title: Versatile application – for every stubborn area
features.description:
FREEZE ME SLIM is one of the most versatile body-contouring systems.
Abdomen and waist (love handles)
Thigh and buttock contouring
Upper arms ("bingo wings" zone)
Back and flank fat deposits
Cellulite reduction
Skin tightening

features.title: Integrated body analysis – measurable results
features.description:
The FREEZE ME SLIM package also includes a professional body composition analyzer that communicates with the device via Bluetooth. The measured data is automatically transferred to the client management system, so accurate comparisons can be made at every visit.

Measured parameters:

Body fat percentage, muscle mass
BMI, body weight, hydration level
Visceral fat level, metabolism
Body age, health index
features.highlight: 5-150 kg measurement range, suitable for ages 7-99.

features.title: All four seasons – year-round treatment
features.description: Cryolipolysis is not a seasonal treatment, providing your salon with continuous revenue throughout the year. Clients see the difference even fully clothed, which is especially valuable in winter, and the rate of repeat bookings keeps growing. The recommended course is 3 sessions spaced one month apart, and results appear gradually as the body's natural processes break down the fat cells.
features.highlight: Up to 25% fat-cell reduction after a single treatment (technological principle).

training.headline: Comprehensive training and business support – included in the purchase
training.intro: FREEZE ME SLIM is not just a device – it is a complete system that lets you deliver a professional service from day one. The complimentary base package gives you all the knowledge and tools you need for a successful start.
items: Complete client documentation and treatment cards
Lifestyle guide compiled by a successful personal trainer
Nutritional guide prepared by a dietitian
closingParagraphs: Hands-on training with a live model is also available (89,990 Ft) – real treatments, confident start before your first clients arrive, immediate answers to every question. The price includes the cost of materials and the full practical training.
We won't leave you on your own: we will teach you how to turn it into profit.
training.freeText: Complete training package FREE with your machine purchase!
training.duration: Base package: self-study | Live training: 1 day

expertQuote.quote: The strength of FREEZE ME SLIM lies not only in the parallel work made possible by the 4 applicators, but also in the integrated body analysis. The client doesn't only feel the change – they see it, understand it and believe it. That is what dramatically increases the trust level of the treatment and the completion rate of the courses.
expertQuote.author: Gaszler Simonetta

functionCards.name: 4 applicators
functionCards.description: Simultaneous use, 3 sizes – for every body area.

functionCards.name: Long-lasting result
functionCards.description: Eliminated fat cells do not return.

faq.question: How does cryolipolysis work?
faq.answer: FREEZE ME SLIM works by controlled cooling of the fat cells (down to -10°C). The cells crystallise, then the body gradually breaks them down and eliminates them naturally. The result is not immediate – it appears over weeks as a natural, gradual transformation.

faq.question: How many sessions make up a course?
faq.answer: The recommended course is 3 sessions spaced one month apart. A characteristic of the treatment is that results don't appear instantly but develop gradually through the body's natural processes. Up to 25% fat-cell reduction can be achieved on the treated area after just one session.

faq.question: What does the body analysis system include?
faq.answer: The package contains a professional Bluetooth bioimpedance scale that measures 8 parameters: body fat %, muscle mass, BMI, body weight, hydration level, visceral fat level, metabolism (BMR), body age and health index. Data is valid for body weights of 5-150 kg and ages 7-99.

faq.question: How many applicators can I use at the same time?
faq.answer: All 4 applicators can be used simultaneously. This allows several body areas to be treated in parallel, drastically reducing treatment time and increasing the number of clients you can serve in a day.

faq.question: When is the treatment NOT recommended?
faq.answer: The treatment is NOT recommended during pregnancy, in case of cold allergy or certain medical conditions. A client health assessment is always required before the treatment. The complete client documentation and treatment protocols help you with this.

faq.question: What is included in the price?
faq.answer: The 2,299,990 Ft includes the full training package (training material, client cards, treatment protocols, educational materials, lifestyle and nutritional guides), 2-year warranty, and the body analysis system. Hands-on training with a live model is optional for an additional 89,990 Ft.

whatsIncluded: Lifestyle and nutritional guides (personal trainer + dietitian)
